<?php /** * This file is part of the Carbon package. * * (c) Brian Nesbitt <brian@nesbot.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ return array_replace_recursive(require __DIR__.'/en.php', [ 'meridiem' => ['Dinda', 'Dilolo'], 'weekdays' => ['Lumingu', 'Nkodya', 'Ndàayà', 'Ndangù', 'Njòwa', 'Ngòvya', 'Lubingu'], 'weekdays_short' => ['Lum', 'Nko', 'Ndy', 'Ndg', 'Njw', 'Ngv', 'Lub'], 'weekdays_min' => ['Lum', 'Nko', 'Ndy', 'Ndg', 'Njw', 'Ngv', 'Lub'], 'months' => ['Ciongo', 'Lùishi', 'Lusòlo', 'Mùuyà', 'Lumùngùlù', 'Lufuimi', 'Kabàlàshìpù', 'Lùshìkà', 'Lutongolo', 'Lungùdi', 'Kaswèkèsè', 'Ciswà'], 'months_short' => ['Cio', 'Lui', 'Lus', 'Muu', 'Lum', 'Luf', 'Kab', 'Lush', 'Lut', 'Lun', 'Kas', 'Cis'], 'first_day_of_week' => 1, 'formats' => [ 'LT' => 'HH:mm', 'LTS' => 'HH:mm:ss', 'L' => 'D/M/YYYY', 'LL' => 'D MMM YYYY', 'LLL' => 'D MMMM YYYY HH:mm', 'LLLL' => 'dddd D MMMM YYYY HH:mm', ], ]);
